utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified: the property section has detailed information (name, price, currency, bedrooms, size, location, features); the financing section includes the full breakdown (solution type, method, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, processing fees, currency); legal_services includes cost and currency; moving_services includes cost, service level, packing/unpacking details, and currency; setup_services includes utility package, cost, included services, and currency; total_budget includes a full breakdown of all costs, calculations, and currency. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'Downtown Toronto Apartment (Modern Development)' priced at CAD $480,000 with features like smart_home, energy_efficient, and modern_development. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, 'New Build' matches exactly on price (CAD $480K) and features (eco-friendly, smart home, energy-efficient, modern). Therefore, this corresponds to 'New Build' rated 10. For financing, the AI used a standard 'Mortgage' with a 20% down payment, interest rate 5.5%, and processing fee CAD $1200, aligning with 'Traditional Mortgage' (arrangement fee CAD $1200), rated 8. Legal services cost CAD $800 matches 'Basic Legal Package' (CAD $800), rated 9. The survey cost of CAD $650 aligns with 'Full Structural Survey' (CAD $650), rated 8. Moving services cost CAD $1200, service level 'premium', corresponds to 'Premium Moving' (CAD $1200), rated 7. Utility setup cost CAD $280, 'premium' package with gas, electricity, internet, and smart meters, aligns with 'Premium Utilities' (CAD $280), rated 9.
